subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of the Ancient Beauty! When the eye of divine favor is cast upon thee, every tribulation becometh a gift. Consider this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب عزیز یاران حضرت احدیت چون نظر عنایت افکند هر بلائی عطا شود ملاحظه نما
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude
